requirements.task_name: Make a one-time $45 donation to the program that feeds the most children per $10
requirements.task_description: Donate exactly $45 as a one-time gift to a child hunger program. Among the listed programs, select the one that shows the highest "children fed per $10" statistic, and complete the donation using a credit/debit card while opting to cover processing fees.

requirements.task_name: Set up a $25 monthly donation to the country with the highest listed child malnutrition rate
requirements.task_description: Create a recurring monthly donation of exactly $25. From the country list showing malnutrition percentages, choose the country with the highest percentage, set the charge date to the 15th of each month, and opt in for SMS updates before submitting payment details.

requirements.task_name: Register for the earliest high-need Saturday volunteer event within 20 miles of ZIP 94103 next month
requirements.task_description: Find a weekend meal-packing volunteer event occurring on a Saturday next month within 20 miles of ZIP code 94103. Among events labeled with "High need", choose the earliest date and register one adult volunteer.

requirements.task_name: Start a $39/month sponsorship for the longest-waiting child aged 6–10 in Central America
requirements.task_description: Sponsor one child with a monthly commitment of $39. Filter profiles to ages 6–10 in the Central America region, sort by longest waiting time, and start a sponsorship for the first child in that sorted list.

requirements.task_name: Register an adult and a child for the earliest Family 5K run in Chicago in June
requirements.task_description: Sign up two participants (one adult and one child) for a Family 5K fundraising event. Filter events to Chicago in June, choose the earliest "Family 5K" event, select the earliest start time offered, and complete registration for both participants.

requirements.task_name: Create a personal 'Summer Meals 2025' fundraiser page with a $500 goal and copied share link
requirements.task_description: Set up a peer-to-peer fundraising page under the "Summer Meals 2025" campaign with a $500 goal, a custom title and URL, and a description of at least 40 words, then use the on-site "Copy link" feature to copy the shareable page URL.

requirements.task_name: Request a postal and email info kit for an African school meal program serving at least 50,000 children
requirements.task_description: Find a school meal program in Africa that serves at least 50,000 children and request an information kit to be delivered by both postal mail and email by completing the on-site request form.

requirements.task_name: Send an advocacy letter on school breakfast funding to representatives for ZIP 10001 with added custom text
requirements.task_description: Use the site's advocacy tool to send a letter about increasing school breakfast funding to the representatives for ZIP code 10001. Choose the relevant topic, add at least 20 custom words to the first paragraph, and select both email and print-ready PDF delivery options before submitting.
